heroInsight: Carousel posts dominate with a 2.5x engagement boost over static images, leveraging curiosity and saves on posts with transformation narratives.

formatPerformance.summary: Carousels are outperforming all other formats due to high save rates and deeper engagement with swipe-through content.

data.name: Reel
data.note: Reels are seeing a slight decline as carousels offer more in-depth storytelling.

data.name: Carousel
data.note: Carousels are leading with high save rates, particularly on transformation stories.

data.name: Story
data.note: Stories maintain steady engagement but lack the save potential of carousels.

data.name: Static
data.note: Static posts are underperforming, often overlooked for more interactive formats.

trendingHooks.example: Why I stopped doing cardio every day
I tried intermittent fasting for 30 days
POV: You're hitting your PR at the gym

trendingHooks.template: How I transformed my [body part] in [time]
trendingHooks.example: How I transformed my abs in 8 weeks

postingTimes.summary: Early morning (6-7 AM) and evening (5-6 PM) windows perform best on weekdays. Weekends shift later — 8-9 AM and midday.

trendingAudio.name: DtMF
trendingAudio.recommendation: Use for high-intensity workout montages and transformation reveals.

trendingAudio.name: Temperature x Sweet Dreams (Altego Mix)
trendingAudio.recommendation: Perfect for showcasing daily fitness routines and progress.

trendingAudio.name: Primadonna Girl
trendingAudio.recommendation: Great for before/after transformations and glow-up posts.

hotTopics.detail: With spring approaching, cutting season topics are resonating; focus on diet tips and lean workout routines.
The conversation around Ozempic as a weight loss aid is heating up; address the pros and cons.
Light-hearted gym memes and funny skits are gaining traction; integrate humor into serious content.
Interest in personalized home gym setups is strong; offer tips on budget-friendly equipment.
Focus on workouts that improve everyday movements; highlight benefits over traditional routines.

hashtagIntel.recommendation: Best used in transformation posts to leverage community buzz.

actionItems.action: Post a carousel with a transformation story

critical: DM shares are 3-5x more valuable than likes; create shareable content.
proTips: Utilize carousel posts for their high save rates and deeper engagement.

tiktokCrossover.summary: Emerging TikTok trends poised to hit Instagram soon.
